fields.title: Sony WH-1000XM4 Wireless Headphones
fields.description: Excellent condition, midnight blue color. Includes original carrying case, USB-C charging cable, and 3.5mm audio jack. Battery life still lasts up to 30 hours. Active Noise Cancelling works perfectly.

fields.title: iPad Air (4th Generation) - 64GB Wi-Fi
fields.description: Space Gray, pristine condition with no scratches. Screen protector applied since day one. Comes with the original box and a generic magnetic folio case.
fields.desired_offer: Looking to exchange for a comparable Windows laptop (e.g., ThinkPad or Dell XPS) for coding.

fields.title: iPhone 13 Pro (128GB, Graphite)
fields.description: Excellent condition, always kept in a case. Battery health is at 88%. Includes original box and charging cable.
fields.desired_offer: Looking for a high-end Android tablet or iPad Air.

fields.title: Sony WH-1000XM4 Headphones
fields.description: Silver color, lightly used for a few flights. Comes with the carrying case and airline adapter.

fields.title: Mechanical Keyboard (Keychron K2)
fields.description: Gateron Brown switches, RGB backlight. Wireless Bluetooth connection. Works great with Mac and Windows.
fields.desired_offer: Looking for a logitech MX Master 3S mouse.

fields.title: Kindle Paperwhite (11th Gen)
fields.description: 8GB version with lockscreen ads. Waterproof, perfect for reading by the pool. Box included.

fields.title: GoPro Hero 10 Black
fields.description: Comes with two batteries, a dual charger, and a protective carrying case. Mint condition.

fields.title: Anker 737 Power Bank (PowerCore 24K)
fields.description: 140W fast charging portable charger. Has an smart digital display. Light surface scratches.
fields.desired_offer: Smaller 10,000mAh power bank plus some cash.

fields.title: iPad Mini 6 (64GB, Wi-Fi, Space Gray)
fields.description: Used mainly for reading sheet music. Screen protector applied on day one. Flawless.
fields.desired_offer: Would love to trade for a standard 10.9-inch iPad or an entry-level laptop.

fields.title: Logitech G Pro X Superlight Mouse
fields.description: Ultra-lightweight gaming mouse. White color. Extra PTFE mouse skates included in the box.

fields.title: Razer BlackShark V2 Pro Wireless Headset
fields.description: Premium esports gaming headset. Detachable mic, excellent noise isolation. Box and wireless dongle present.

fields.title: Blue Yeti USB Microphone (Blackout Edition)
fields.description: Perfect for streaming, podcasting, or Zoom calls. Includes desktop stand and USB cable.
fields.desired_offer: A compact audio interface (Focusrite Scarlett Solo or similar).

fields.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 5 (44mm, Bluetooth)
fields.description: Graphite body with black sport band. Comes with magnetic puck charger. Small bezel scuff.
fields.desired_offer: Trade for an equivalent Fitbit or Garmin running watch.

fields.title: Fujifilm Instax Mini 11 (Sky Blue)
fields.description: Instant film camera. Fun for parties. Includes hand strap. Note: does NOT include film packs.

fields.title: Apple Magic Trackpad (White)
fields.description: Rechargeable wireless desktop multi-touch surface. Pairs instantly via Bluetooth. Barely used.

fields.title: Razer Seiren Mini Condenser Mic
fields.description: Ultra-compact streaming microphone. Mercury White edition. Great clarity for gaming comms.
